text: my case would be results that are from two consecutive buildworld such as in your example 1 scenario. i did not try 3 times in a row. i will retest this more thoroughly. indeed, after installworld step, buildworld takes slightly more time which is expected, from your explanation, but i had no full llvm/clang rebuild on version 12.2. i will report back asap.
